2026-03-10T02:27:23.8685312Z         at com.imageworks.spcue.test.dispatcher.FrameCompleteHandlerTests.testDependRetryExhausted(FrameCompleteHandlerTests.java:534)
2026-03-10T02:27:23.8685859Z

Fix it please

content.thinking: Let me look at the failing test to understand what's expected.

The test `testDependRetryExhausted` calls `executeDependWithRetry(3, 1, FrameState.DEPEND)`, expecting that when all 3 retry attempts fail, the depend count remains 1 and state remains DEPEND.

But the assertion fails with `expected:<1> but was:<0>`, meaning the depend count is 0 instead of 1. This means the dependency is being satisfied even though all retries failed.

Let me look at the actual `handlePostFrameCompleteOperations` method to understand the retry logic.

content.text: Let me look at the retry logic in the handler.
